input.topic: A national airline announced it will cut 20% of domestic routes

coverage.summary: Led with the economic impact on regional airports. Quoted aviation analysts and a regional development agency. Framed as an infrastructure story.
Led with stranded passengers and holiday disruption. Quoted affected travellers. Framed as a consumer story.
Focused on the airline's financial restructuring. Quoted the CEO's investor call. Framed as a corporate turnaround story.
Covered the impact on one specific city that will lose its only domestic air link. Quoted the local mayor and business owners.

input.audience: Editorial team at a TV news programme

input.topic: Opening of a new public swimming pool

coverage.summary: Positive coverage of the opening ceremony. Quoted the mayor.
Criticised the pool's location as inaccessible by public transport.
Reviewed the facilities and compared them to other new builds.

input.topic: Italy's decision to withdraw from China's Belt and Road Initiative

coverage.summary: Detailed diplomatic analysis. Quoted foreign ministry sources. Framed as a realignment toward the EU and US.
Described the withdrawal as damaging to bilateral relations. Quoted a foreign ministry spokesperson expressing disappointment.
Focused on the trade implications. Noted that Italian exports to China grew 30% during BRI membership. Questioned whether the economic relationship would survive.
Framed it as a test case for EU coordination on China policy. Noted that no other EU member state had joined BRI.
Analysed it as evidence of Western decoupling from China. Quoted a US State Department official welcoming the move.

input.audience: Foreign affairs desk at a European news agency
